message:
fix(config): infer issue prefix from JSONL in load_config to prevent bd-* fallback

When the DB layer was missing the stored issue_prefix (e.g. after
auto-rebuild from corruption), load_config() would fall back to the
hardcoded "bd" default. This caused `br create` to generate bd-*
IDs in workspaces that use a different prefix (e.g. swinglab-*),
then --no-db operations would fail with mixed-prefix CONFIG_ERROR.

Now inserts a JSONL-inferred prefix layer between the hardcoded
defaults and the DB layer in the config merge chain. This only
takes effect when no higher-precedence layer (DB, user config,
project config, env, CLI) provides a prefix.

Closes #146

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
